title: Little Drops Of Water
content:
"Little drops of water,
        Little drains of sand,
        Mate a might okum (ocean),
        And a peasant land.
        "Little words of kindness,
        Pokin evvy day,
        Make a home a hebbin,
        And hep us on a way."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Louisa May Alcott delivers a powerful performance in "Little Drops Of Water"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
